set -e
SRC_ROOT="/Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw"
TARGET_ROOT="/Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/agents"
REPORT="/Users/ainchorsoc2a/.openclaw/workspace/state/agent-dirs-populated-2026-07-15.json"

# Agent ID : workspace directory name
declare -A MAP=(
  [architect]="workspace-architect"
  [platform-arch]="workspace-platform-arch"
  [ahsoka]="workspace-ahsoka"
  [social]="workspace-social"
  [biz-process]="workspace-bpm"
  [change-mgt]="workspace-dtcm"
  [governance]="workspace-governance"
  [legal]="workspace-legal"
  [qa]="workspace-qa"
  [security]="workspace-security"
  [luthen]="workspace-luthen"
)

# Required files
CORE_FILES=(SOUL.md AGENTS.md HEARTBEAT.md IDENTITY.md TOOLS.md)

# Build JSON results array
RESULTS_JSON="["
FIRST=1
for AGENT in "${!MAP[@]}"; do
  SRC_DIR="$SRC_ROOT/${MAP[$AGENT]}"
  TGT_DIR="$TARGET_ROOT/$AGENT/agent"

  if [ $FIRST -eq 0 ]; then RESULTS_JSON+=","; fi
  FIRST=0

  AGENT_RESULT="{\"agent_id\":\"$AGENT\",\"source_dir\":\"$SRC_DIR\",\"target_dir\":\"$TGT_DIR\","

  if [ ! -d "$SRC_DIR" ]; then
    AGENT_RESULT+='"status":"FAIL","reason":"source dir missing","source_files":[],"copied":[],"verification":"FAIL"}'
    RESULTS_JSON+="$AGENT_RESULT"
    echo "FAIL: $AGENT — source dir missing: $SRC_DIR"
    continue
  fi

  if [ ! -d "$TGT_DIR" ]; then
    AGENT_RESULT+='"status":"FAIL","reason":"target dir missing","source_files":[],"copied":[],"verification":"FAIL"}'
    RESULTS_JSON+="$AGENT_RESULT"
    echo "FAIL: $AGENT — target dir missing: $TGT_DIR"
    continue
  fi

  # Enumerate source files (full set in source for record)
  SRC_FILES=()
  for f in "$SRC_DIR"/*.md; do
    [ -f "$f" ] || continue
    SRC_FILES+=("$(basename "$f")")
  done
  # Sort for stable JSON
  IFS=$'\n' SRC_FILES_SORTED=($(sort <<<"${SRC_FILES[*]}"))
  unset IFS

  AGENT_RESULT+='"source_files":['
  SF_FIRST=1
  for sf in "${SRC_FILES_SORTED[@]}"; do
    if [ $SF_FIRST -eq 0 ]; then AGENT_RESULT+=","; fi
    SF_FIRST=0
    AGENT_RESULT+="\"$sf\""
  done
  AGENT_RESULT+="],"

  # Copy core files
  COPIED=()
  SKIPPED_EXISTING=()
  for f in "${CORE_FILES[@]}"; do
    if [ -f "$SRC_DIR/$f" ]; then
      if [ -f "$TGT_DIR/$f" ]; then
        SKIPPED_EXISTING+=("$f")
      else
        cp -p "$SRC_DIR/$f" "$TGT_DIR/$f"
        COPIED+=("$f")
      fi
    fi
  done

  # Copy any *RULES.md files
  for f in "$SRC_DIR"/*RULES.md; do
    [ -f "$f" ] || continue
    fname="$(basename "$f")"
    if [ -f "$TGT_DIR/$fname" ]; then
      SKIPPED_EXISTING+=("$fname")
    else
      cp -p "$f" "$TGT_DIR/$fname"
      COPIED+=("$fname")
    fi
  done

  AGENT_RESULT+='"copied":['
  C_FIRST=1
  for c in "${COPIED[@]}"; do
    if [ $C_FIRST -eq 0 ]; then AGENT_RESULT+=","; fi
    C_FIRST=0
    AGENT_RESULT+="\"$c\""
  done
  AGENT_RESULT+="],\"skipped_existing\":["
  SE_FIRST=1
  for se in "${SKIPPED_EXISTING[@]}"; do
    if [ $SE_FIRST -eq 0 ]; then AGENT_RESULT+=","; fi
    SE_FIRST=0
    AGENT_RESULT+="\"$se\""
  done
  AGENT_RESULT+="],"

  # Verification: target must have SOUL.md AND AGENTS.md
  VERIFY="PASS"
  VERIFY_NOTES=""
  for f in "${CORE_FILES[@]}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$TGT_DIR/$f" ]; then
      if [ "$f" = "SOUL.md" ] || [ "$f" = "AGENTS.md" ]; then
        VERIFY="FAIL"
        VERIFY_NOTES+="missing $f; "
      else
        VERIFY_NOTES+="missing $f; "
      fi
    fi
  done
  AGENT_RESULT+='"verification":"'$VERIFY'","verify_notes":"'${VERIFY_NOTES:-ok}'"'

  # Status: FAIL if verify fails, else PASS
  if [ "$VERIFY" = "PASS" ]; then
    AGENT_RESULT+=',"status":"OK"'
  else
    AGENT_RESULT+=',"status":"FAIL"'
  fi
  AGENT_RESULT+="}"

  RESULTS_JSON+="$AGENT_RESULT"
  echo "OK: $AGENT — copied ${#COPIED[@]} files, verify=$VERIFY"
done
RESULTS_JSON+="]"

    SF_FIRST=0
    AGENT_RESULT+="\"$sf\""
  done
  AGENT_RESULT+="],"

  COPIED=()
  SKIPPED_EXISTING=()
  for f in "${CORE_FILES[@]}"; do
    if [ -f "$SRC_DIR/$f" ]; then
      if [ -f "$TGT_DIR/$f" ]; then
        SKIPPED_EXISTING+=("$f")
      else
        cp -p "$SRC_DIR/$f" "$TGT_DIR/$f"
        COPIED+=("$f")
      fi
    fi
  done

  for f in "$SRC_DIR"/*RULES.md; do
    [ -f "$f" ] || continue
    fname="$(basename "$f")"
    if [ -f "$TGT_DIR/$fname" ]; then
      SKIPPED_EXISTING+=("$fname")
    else
      cp -p "$f" "$TGT_DIR/$fname"
      COPIED+=("$fname")
    fi
  done

  AGENT_RESULT+='"copied":['
  C_FIRST=1
  for c in "${COPIED[@]}"; do
    if [ $C_FIRST -eq 0 ]; then AGENT_RESULT+=","; fi
    C_FIRST=0
    AGENT_RESULT+="\"$c\""
  done
  AGENT_RESULT+="],\"skipped_existing\":["
  SE_FIRST=1
  for se in "${SKIPPED_EXISTING[@]}"; do
    if [ $SE_FIRST -eq 0 ]; then AGENT_RESULT+=","; fi
    SE_FIRST=0
    AGENT_RESULT+="\"$se\""
  done
  AGENT_RESULT+="],"

  VERIFY="PASS"
  VERIFY_NOTES=""
  for f in "${CORE_FILES[@]}"; do
    if [ ! -f "$TGT_DIR/$f" ]; then
      if [ "$f" = "SOUL.md" ] || [ "$f" = "AGENTS.md" ]; then
        VERIFY="FAIL"
        VERIFY_NOTES+="missing $f; "
      else
        VERIFY_NOTES+="missing $f; "
      fi
    fi
  done
  AGENT_RESULT+='"verification":"'$VERIFY'","verify_notes":"'${VERIFY_NOTES:-ok}'"'

  if [ "$VERIFY" = "PASS" ]; then
    AGENT_RESULT+=',"status":"OK"'
  else
    AGENT_RESULT+=',"status":"FAIL"'
  fi
  AGENT_RESULT+="}"

  RESULTS_JSON+="$AGENT_RESULT"
  echo "OK: $AGENT — copied ${#COPIED[@]} files, verify=$VERIFY"
  i=$((i+1))
done
RESULTS_JSON+="]"
